name: International Sausage Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Keilbasa, halved length-wise and sliced thinly
8 ounces dry pasta (twists, shells or Penne)
16 ounce can Italian Stewed Tomatoes (cut up, do NOT drain)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the Keilbasa slices.
2. Stir together in the skillet with season to taste with salt, pepper, soy sauce, onion flakes, garlic, or any other spices you enjoy.
3. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to the lowest setting.
5. Cover pan and simmer for 30 minutes until pasta is tender. Stir occasionally to prevent rice and pasta from sticking.
6. Stir in cheese if desired.
7. Serve. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
To Bake in Oven:
1. Mix all ingredients in a casserole dish and cover tightly.
2. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
